{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/57210489?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/alcls01111", "id": 57210489, "login": "alcls01111", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU3MjEwNDg5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/alcls01111", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49860", "cvss": {"score": 5.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "## Summary

When a WebSocket connection was opened, Deno checked the destination hostname
against `--deny-net` rules but did not re-check the IP addresses that hostname
resolved to. An attacker-controlled script could use a specially crafted domain
name that passes the hostname check yet resolves to a denied IP, bypassing the
network restriction entirely.

## Impact

Code running under `--deny-net` could connect to hosts that the user intended
to block. In practice this means network isolation rules — for example,
blocking access to `localhost` or internal services — could be silently
circumvented by a malicious or compromised dependency.

`Deno.connect` and `fetch()` were not affected by this specific issue (a
companion advisory covers `fetch()`).

## Who is affected

Users who:

- run untrusted or third-party code with `deno run`, and
- rely on `--deny-net` to restrict which hosts that code can reach.

If you do not use `--deny-net`, or if you only run fully trusted code, you are
not affected.

## Workaround

No workaround is available short of upgrading. If upgrading immediately is not
possible, avoid granting `--allow-net` to untrusted code that also has
`--deny-net` restrictions you depend on for security.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00101, "percentile": 0.01088}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-83pc-3rw9-qpwj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T19:04:07Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-83pc-3rw9-qpwj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-83pc-3rw9-qpwj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49860"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-16T19:04:07Z", "references": ["https://github.com/denoland/deno/security/advisories/GHSA-83pc-3rw9-qpwj", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-83pc-3rw9-qpwj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/denoland/deno/security-advisories/GHSA-83pc-3rw9-qpwj", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/denoland/deno", "summary": "Deno: WebSocket API sandbox bypass via missing post-DNS check", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T19:04:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-83pc-3rw9-qpwj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "deno"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Deno: WebSocket API sandbox bypass via missing post-DNS check
